2605.25971.title: Anticipate and Learn: Unleashing Idle-Time Compute in Proactive Agents
2605.25971.paper_summary: While AI agents demonstrate remarkable capabilities in reasoning and tool use, they remain fundamentally reactive: they compute responses only after explicit user prompts. This paradigm ignores a critical opportunity: the idle time between interactions is largely wasted, leaving agents unable to prepare for future user needs. To bridge this gap, we introduce ProAct, a proactive agent architecture that leverages idle-time compute to anticipate and fulfill likely upcoming user needs. By analyzing evolving dialogue history together with persistent memory, ProAct predicts upcoming needs and iteratively acquires information, allowing the agent to resolve knowledge gaps and prepare evidence before the user initiates a query.To rigorously evaluate proactive capabilities, we also introduce ProActEval, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 200 scenarios across 40 domains, featuring predictable need chains and diverse user cognitive profiles. Empirical results demonstrate significant advantages over reactive baselines. ProAct accelerates task completion by reducing required turns by 14.8%, decreases user effort by 11.7%, and cuts hallucination rates by 28.1% on ProActEval. Furthermore, MemBench evaluations confirm that ProAct achieves state-of-the-art reflective accuracy, underscoring its sustained and robust performance.
2605.25971.paper_summary_zh: 雖然人工智慧代理展示了在推理和工具使用方面的卓越能力，但它們仍然是根本性的反應性：它們僅在明確的用戶提示後計算回應。這一範式忽略了一個關鍵機會：互動之間的閒置時間在很大程度上被浪費，導致代理無法為未來的用戶需求做好準備。為了填補這一空白，我們介紹了 ProAct，一種主動代理架構，利用閒置時間計算來預測和滿足可能即將出現的用戶需求。通過分析不斷演變的對話歷史以及持久記憶，ProAct 預測即將到來的需求並迭代獲取信息，使代理能夠解決知識空白並在用戶發起查詢之前準備證據。為了嚴格評估主動能力，我們還介紹了 ProActEval，一個全面的基準，包含 200 個場景，涵蓋 40 個領域，特徵包括可預測的需求鏈和多樣的用戶認知特徵。實證結果顯示，ProAct 相較於反應性基準具有顯著優勢。ProAct 通過減少所需回合數 14.8% 來加速任務完成，減少用戶努力 11.7%，並在 ProActEval 上將幻覺率降低 28.1%。此外，MemBench 評估確認 ProAct 實現了最先進的反思準確性，突顯了其持續且穩健的表現。
2605.25971.author: Haoyi Hu et.al.
2605.25971.authors: Haoyi Hu, Qirong Lyu, Xianghan Kong, Weiwen Liu, Jianghao Lin, Zixuan Guo, Yan Xu, Yasheng Wang, Weinan Zhang, Yong Yu
